name: Charteris Kartazen
description: __Height:__ 188cm (6'2") Kartazen Empire's Second Prince. Befitting the prestige of one granted the Golden Blessing, he has everything from looks, to wealth, to outstanding swordsmanship.

name: Chitose Karasuyama
description: A second-year and the Student Council President. Her authority is so great even the teachers fear her. Her element is "Earth", and her main combat method includes punching her opponent, throwing dirt at them, or digging traps. She also has a habit of burying her victims up to the neck. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Dot
description: A skilled programmer responsible for the Brave Asagi's technology system and a member of the Rising Volteccers. Online, she is known as Gurumin, a popular streamer that makes videos on various topics of the Pokémon world. Dot seems to be reclusive and spends most of her time behind doors creating videos, and is rarely seen by the other Rising Volteccers members. On the other hand, as Gurumin, she is seen as perky, using exaggerated teaching methods, and giving a beginner's guide to Trainers inte

name: Estella
description: Estella is an AI staff working at the space hotel "Sunrise" outside the atmosphere. Her mission as an AI is "to take care of human beings as a life keeper." She is polite, tolerant, and friendly. (Source: Official Site, translated)

name: Evelyn Celebrían
nativeName: イヴリン・ケレブリアン
description: __Height:__ 167cm __Items:__ Dagger, Dual-Wield Weapon __Personality:__ Kind, Pacifist, Shy __Role:__ Elf, Full Sister, Younger Sister She was helped by the protagonist when she was kidnapped. To repay him for saving her, she now stays with him. She also happens to excel at all manners of housework. While she is not good with dealing with others, she is the type to fawn over and devote herself to a person if they let their guard down.

name: Frenci Mastibolt
nativeName: フレンシィ・マスティボルト
description: The daughter of the Mastibolt family, the leader of the Southern Night Demons. Formerly engaged to [Xylo](https://anilist.co/character/355722/Xylo-Forbartz), their engagement was annulled when he became a Hero, but she refuses to acknowledge that she broke off her engagement with him. Her expression remains unchanged as she utters harsh words.

name: Fujiko Etou
description: Fujiko Etou is the current head of the Etou family, the head of the girl's dorms at Constant Academy, and the only person who understands Akuto's current situation. Her older brother, the Etou's previous head, was killed after failing a mission, causing Fujiko to become the new head of the family, though for unexplained reasons, she kept her brother's (revived) head, which is kept in a jar-like container filled with fluid. name: Gabriela Lotaryńska
nativeName: ガブリエラ・ロタルィンスカ
description: __Birthplace:__ Poland Gabriela’s father is part of the military and she’s competitive for just about anything. She’s strict on herself a lot more than she is to those around her, and doesn’t spare an effort for anything. She may be the youngest of Trinary but is able to use all kinds of guns in battle. She’s called “Gab” or “Gabby” by those close to her.

name: Haruhisa Kuribayashi
description: __Height:__ 178 cm Kuribayashi is considered a football genius, making his professional debut at age 16 for Tokyo City Esperion FC of the J-1 League. He also plays for Japan's Under-20 National Team.

name: Hector Doyle
description: Hector Doyle is a death row inmate who escaped the Caglios prison to find a suitable opponent to face him. He survived his execution on the electric chair. He doesn't use a specific fighting style, but is extremely dangerous due to his modified body. (Source: Baki Wiki)

name: Hitoshi Sugoroku
description: Hajime Sugoroku's brother.

name: Juliette
description: Juliette is an orphaned Dwarf and slave purchased by Rudeus and Zanoba with the purpose of helping them in the making of dolls. She was acquired because she fit the criteria of being a child, a Dwarf and by being a Dwarf having dexterous hands, which is preferable in doll-making. She's wary of Rudeus to an extent because of him befitting the behaviour of a folklore individual characterised by typical traits parents tell their children to deter them.

name: Kaisel
description: Kaisel is a shadow Sung Jin-Woo obtained in the Demon Castle. Kaisel is the shadow of Kaisellin, a Drake/Wyvern that Demon King Baran used as a mount. Kaisel used to be a mount that the Demon King Baran rode in battle. After Sung Jin-Woo's fight, he looks around and found that Iron already killed Kaisellin, dragging his corpse towards Sung Jin-Woo. After he was extracted, his grade was Knight, which concludes he was at least an A-Rank.
mediaTitles: Solo Leveling Season 2 -Arise from the Shadow-
searchTerms: Solo Leveling Season 2 -Arise from the Shadow-

name: Kaito Doumoto
description: Kaito, the son of a pair of musicians, is an avid surfer, as well as Lucia's love interest. Though he is popular with girls, he is secretly in love with a beautiful mermaid who saved him from a shipwreck seven years ago, and has yet to realize that this mermaid is Lucia. ~!Later in the story, it is discovered that beneath Kaito's human exterior lie some distinctively un-human qualities.!~
mediaTitles: Mermaid Melody: Pichi Pichi Pitch Pure
searchTerms: Mermaid Melody: Pichi Pichi Pitch Pure

name: Kawamatsu
description: __Occupation:__ Samurai Kawamatsu once served under Kozuki Oden until Oden was executed 20 years ago. However, Kin'emon believes that Kawamatsu is still alive. ~! Later on found to be alive but imprisoned in Kaidou's labor camp !~ Along with Denjirou and Ashura Douji, Kawamatsu is considered by Kin'emon to have been one of Oden's most powerful followers, being worth 100 men in battle.

name: Kihel Heim
description: Oldest daughter of the Heim family. Though Kihel is a wealthy heiress, she chooses to look for work and gain real-world experience rather than attend university. She sticks close to Guin Lineford during Dianna Counter's first attack and uses the opportunity to become his assistant. Her new position brings her to the attention of the leaders of the Moonrace. Kihel bears a striking resemblance to Dianna Soreil, which allows her to become her double. (Note: Kihel has darker skin and Dianna has ligh

name: Kitten
description: Kat is the main protagonist of Gravity Rush and Gravity Rush 2, also appearing in Another Story - Raven's Choice. Having started out as a lost girl with no memory, Kat quickly embraces a superhero role within the city of Hekseville as a gravity shifter. Her adventures eventually take her to the ends of the world, where she is allowed glimpses of her clouded past. (Source: Gravity Rush Wikia, edited)

name: Kiyoko Yoshida
description: She is the class representative for Class 2-1. She is a bit more of a worrier than most people. She is concerned about Yano-kun, who is constantly getting injured.

name: Kukuri
description: Kukuri is a magic user who uses the magic Guruguru... shes not very good at remembering the symbols though and can sometimes be fussy! She was given to Nike to try to save the world!

name: Kuuya Yakamashi
description: A staff member at Gama Gama Aquarium. He speaks frankly, and looks lazy, but is very serious at his job. He is not good at talking to girls in his age group, and often avoids making eye contact with them. With the aquarium as short handed as it is, he runs long shifts that tire him out. He is quite fond of the umeshu that [Kukuru's](https://anilist.co/character/204495/Kukuru-Misakino) grandmother makes. (Source: Anime News Network)
